subject: docs(session-notes): record full tidy sweep tally
body:
Wrapping up a session that adopted the glow-props Triggers rewrite and
then ran the complete tidy sweep (clean → doc-cleanup → hacks → deps →
undone → dx). Each section captures commit SHA + key decisions + what
was deferred so the next session can resume without re-deriving context.
